parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ thing_id: $('Predictive Maintenance Engine').item.json.work_order.thing_id, severity: 'WARNING', work_order: $('Predictive Maintenance Engine').item.json.work_order, event: $('Predictive Maintenance Engine').item.json, title: 'Predictive maintenance required', message: 'Priority ' + $('Predictive Maintenance Engine').item.json.work_order.priority + ' work order for ' + $('Predictive Maintenance Engine').item.json.work_order.thing_id }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ properties: { work_order_id: $('Predictive Maintenance Engine').item.json.work_order?.work_order_id, priority: $('Predictive Maintenance Engine').item.json.work_order?.priority, wear_index: $('Predictive Maintenance Engine').item.json.work_order?.wear_index, estimated_failure_days: $('Predictive Maintenance Engine').item.json.work_order?.estimated_failure_days, next_service_date: $('Predictive Maintenance Engine').item.json.work_order?.next_service_date, tasks: $('Predictive Maintenance Engine').item.json.work_order?.tasks, generated_at: $('Predictive Maintenance Engine').item.json.work_order?.generated_at } }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO maintenance_work_orders (work_order_id, correlation_id, thing_id, issue_key, priority, wear_index, estimated_failure_days, tasks, evidence, status, created_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6::numeric, $7::integer, $8::jsonb, $9::jsonb, 'OPEN', COALESCE($10::timestamptz, NOW())) ON CONFLICT (thing_id, issue_key) WHERE status IN ('OPEN', 'IN_PROGRESS') DO UPDATE SET priority = EXCLUDED.priority, wear_index = GREATEST(maintenance_work_orders.wear_index, EXCLUDED.wear_index), estimated_failure_days = LEAST(maintenance_work_orders.estimated_failure_days, EXCLUDED.estimated_failure_days), evidence = maintenance_work_orders.evidence || EXCLUDED.evidence;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ thing_id: $json.thing_id, severity: $json.security_analysis.severity, event: $json, title: 'Security escalation', message: `Security state ${$json.security_analysis.state} for ${$json.thing_id}` }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ ...($json.payload.security || {}), state: $json.security_analysis.state, alert_level: $json.security_analysis.alert_level, blacklisted_cards: $json.security_analysis.blacklisted_cards, last_review_at: $json.security_analysis.analyzed_at, active_security_incident: $json.security_analysis.active_security_incident, security_recommendation: $json.security_analysis.security_recommendation }) }}
